reviews.review_description: For it’s relatively cheap price I would of paid more for it. The game challenges you to calculate fuel burn and at the same time deal with gravity and orbiting moons along with asteroids. The levels get harder as you go through and the graphics are so great and the AR is a great experience! 10/10

reviews.review_title: its good and exactly what i want
reviews.review_description: to say its a simple shuttle lander game isn't doing it enough justice.  the graphics alone show care and love. the gameplay is exactly what you think it is and that's great. maybe it has this setting and i didnt see it but i want a full vr option.  i have a meta quest 2 MR isnt all that pretty in grainy grayscale.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words! 
We are working on an update that will allow users to disable passthrough and play in full VR, among other new features. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Classic Game Brang to life in Mix Realit
reviews.review_description: Very Addictive Game hope there be more levels  in future Recommend this Game Great Game 👍

Easy to learn, hard to master. 
Great mixed reality game for the lunch break. 

Looking forward to more levels and game modes.

Has a ton of potential!

reviews.review_title: Addictive! A new take on a classic
reviews.review_description: I love the classic lunar lander game, so I picked this up right away when I saw it. Astro Lander is fresh take - easy to learn, challenging to master and super rewarding when you finally crack those final levels.
